faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Montclair typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment methods required. faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Montclair residents experiencing rat emergencies. Our proximity to the area allows us to respond quickly to protect your home and family from the health risks associated with rodent infestations.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, removal of rats, sanitation of affected areas, exclusion work to seal entry points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination.
